item.title: ‘His credit rating is wrecked’: My son and his girlfriend mingled their finances. Big mistake.
item.description: “She was a shopper and spent over $1,000 a month on weight-loss drugs.”

item.title: Here’s how strong the S&P 500 performs when inflation is falling rather than rising
item.description: S&P returns when CPI is falling average 18.5% and inflation may be falling even faster than official data suggest

item.title: Musician Post Malone’s childhood home in Texas is up for sale for just $549,000
item.description: Post Malone’s “famous” childhood home in Texas has hit the market for $549,000—over a decade after he traded the Lone Star State for California amid h...

item.title: Why ECB’s Lagarde may leave her post early
item.description: The Financial Times is reporting Lagarde may leave her office a year ahead of schedule. The ECB hasn’t denied it.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller made a big bet on this country, and it’s already paid off
item.description: Famed investor Stanley Druckenmiller, who mentored both Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Fed Chair nominee Kevin Warsh, looks to have already made...
